round1: Round 1 is mercifully over, and it seems the upsets were a bit much for some of you. While Stephanie pulled off an impressive feat by picking every single underdog to win, M.C.B. appears to have consulted a Magic 8-Ball that only said "Outlook Not So Good" for all the right choices.
round2: Round 2 is in the books, and it seems most of you still don't understand how hockey works. While M.C.B. and Jaclyn actually paid attention to the Detroit series and called it perfectly, the rest of you collectively decided Edmonton was a good pick, which aged like milk, and Mom and M.C.B. are still wondering where Montreal went.
